title: Manage Microsoft 365 services by using Windows PowerShell
summary: This learning path explains how to efficiently manage the most commonly used services in Microsoft 365, such as Microsoft Entra ID, Microsoft Exchange Online, Microsoft SharePoint Online, and Microsoft Teams.

sections.title: Manage Microsoft 365 services by using Windows PowerShell
sections.summary: This learning path explains how to efficiently manage the most commonly used services in Microsoft 365, such as Microsoft Entra ID, Microsoft Exchange Online, Microsoft SharePoint Online, and Microsoft Teams.

lessons.title: Manage users, groups, and licenses in Microsoft Entra ID by using Windows PowerShell
lessons.content_md:
This module covers how to give access to the services in Microsoft 365, so that you can create user accounts and then assign licenses that provide access to the services.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-users-groups-licenses-azure-active-directory-use-windows-powershell/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage users, groups, and licenses in Microsoft Entra ID by using Windows PowerShell

lessons.title: Manage Exchange Online by using Windows PowerShell
lessons.content_md:
This module covers managing mailboxes, resources, and admin roles in Exchange Online with PowerShell.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-exchange-online-use-windows-powershell/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage Exchange Online by using Windows PowerShell

lessons.title: Manage SharePoint Online by using Windows PowerShell
lessons.content_md:
Manage SharePoint Online by using Windows PowerShell

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-sharepoint-online-use-windows-powershell/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage SharePoint Online by using Windows PowerShell

lessons.title: Manage Microsoft Teams by using Windows PowerShell
lessons.content_md:
This module explains how to use Microsoft Teams PowerShell module to perform tasks such as creating teams and managing user permissions.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-microsoft-teams-use-windows-powershell/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage Microsoft Teams by using Windows PowerShell

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Manage Microsoft 365 services by using Windows PowerShell
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Manage Microsoft 365 services by using Windows PowerShell**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
